description: Schema for per-record scaffold-key artifact generated during de-warheaded scaffold extraction.

algorithm.description: Name of the algorithm used for scaffold extraction.

warhead_match.description: Result of warhead matching on the ligand graph.

matched.description: Whether the warhead was successfully matched.

warhead_type.description: The warhead type from core_labels or rule table.

warhead_smarts.description: SMARTS pattern used for warhead matching.

removed_atom_indices.description: Atom indices removed from ligand graph before scaffold derivation.

scaffold_key.description: De-warheaded scaffold key. Null when fallback_reason is set.

fallback_reason.description: Reason scaffold key could not be derived.
